notes: v0.29.6 — Shop deepening. SHIP SKINS now has per-class sub-tabs (SHARD / BASTION / LANCE / CHORUS) and inside each class the skins are split into three labeled buckets: OWNED (your unlocked) / PULSE STORE / SURGE STORE — owned ships sit at the top, premium SURGE at the bottom, clean separation. NEW BUNDLES sidebar tab with 3 placeholder packs (STARTER PACK -15%, PRO LOADOUT -25%, PREMIUM VAULT -40%) each previewing ship + projectile + trail bundled, foundation for v0.30 SURGE-priced sales. NEW PULSEWAVE PRO tab (premium account upsell — 1.5× PULSE/XP, monthly exclusive drops, priority queue, ko-fi support badge, early access — payment hook lands later). BOSS KEYS card now uses the canonical orange-octagon boss_key_tex with rotation + bob + glow. PROJECTILE card: ship rotated 90° so the nose points to the firing direction (no more 'shooting sideways'). TRAIL card: now renders the actual in-game trail (fading colored circles from the equipped colour) — the previous 16 fake glyph variants didn't match what you see in a match.
